name.ja: <ruby>疫<rt>えき</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt>じん</rt></ruby>の<ruby>依鬼<rt>アシュトラ</rt></ruby> ヨア
name.zh-CN: 疫神之依艮鬼 夜亚

text.en: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by revealing 1 face-down card you control and returning it to the hand/Extra Deck. You can only Special Summon "Yoa the Plague Deity Ashtra" once per turn this way. You can only use each of the following effects of "Yoa the Plague Deity Ashtra" once per turn. During your Main Phase: You can Set 1 "Ashtra" Spell/Trap from your Deck. During your opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 face-up monster on the field; increase or decrease its Level by 1.
text.zh-CN: 此卡名以①方法的特殊召唤1回合仅可进行1次，且②③效果1回合仅可各使用1次。①：此卡可通过将自己场上的1张里侧表示卡出示给对手并放回手牌・额外牌组，来从手牌特殊召唤。②：在自己的主要阶段可以发动。从牌组将1张“艮鬼”魔法・陷阱卡放置在自己场上。③：在对手回合中，以场上的1只表侧表示怪兽为对象可以发动。该怪兽的等级上升或下降1。
